comments:
Flags - boolean state atoms for reactive systems.

Every interactive element has boolean states. These atoms are the
foundation for composing interactive behavior.

All types are suffixed with `Flag` to distinguish them from ADT
constructors in other modules (e.g., `SelectedFlag` vs `Selected`
constructor in SelectionState).

declarations.comments: Element is rendered and takes space
declarations.title: VisibleFlag

declarations.comments: Element is not rendered or takes no space
declarations.title: HiddenFlag

declarations.comments: Element is in active/current state (active tab, current step)
declarations.title: ActiveFlag

declarations.comments: Item is selected in a list/grid
declarations.title: SelectedFlag

declarations.comments: Checkbox has partial selection (some children selected)
declarations.title: IndeterminateFlag

declarations.comments: Field has been modified from initial value
declarations.title: DirtyFlag

declarations.comments: Field has been focused and blurred
declarations.title: TouchedFlag

declarations.comments: Field is visible but not editable
declarations.title: ReadOnlyFlag

declarations.comments: Dragged item is over this element
declarations.title: DragOverFlag

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Reactive.Flags
